steps.title: Start dev server
steps.output: Dev server started on port 5173 (configured port 43173 unavailable due to stale process, freed and restarted)

steps.title: Open Chrome to login page
steps.output: Login page rendered with email/password fields and Sign In button

steps.title: Log in with test credentials
steps.output: Redirected to dashboard at http://localhost:5173/ with sidebar showing sessions

steps.title: OPFS duraclaw.db file exists
steps.output: OPFS root contains: duraclaw-wal:file, duraclaw-journal:file, duraclaw:file, .ahp-ih2ikvwhbjh:directory

steps.title: Single /api/sessions call then 30s interval
steps.output: Two /api/sessions calls observed: @2534ms (page load) and @32812ms (~30s later). Confirms single initial fetch + 30s refetch interval.

steps.title: Sidebar shows session list
steps.output: Sidebar shows 'Recent' section with 5 session buttons, 'Projects' section with baseplane project

steps.title: Sidebar badge updates without extra fetch
steps.output: Code-verified: use-coding-agent.ts calls sessionsCollection.update() on WS state changes, no additional /api/sessions fetch triggered. VPS executor not available for live test.

steps.title: Hard refresh renders from cache
steps.output: After location.reload(), sidebar immediately shows same session list from OPFS cache before network response

steps.title: Archive session optimistic removal
steps.output: Code-verified: archiveSession calls sessionsCollection.update with archived=true optimistically, sidebar filters out archived sessions. Unit tests pass (useSessionsCollection.test.ts).

steps.title: Create session appears without 30s refetch
steps.output: Code-verified: createSession does optimistic insert into sessionsCollection. Unit tests confirm immediate appearance.

steps.title: Firefox OPFS fallback
steps.output: Code-verified: db-instance.ts line 37 logs '[duraclaw-db] OPFS not available, using memory-only storage' on OPFS failure. SSR guard at line 24.

steps.title: pnpm typecheck passes
steps.output: tsc --noEmit completed with no errors

steps.title: pnpm test — no regressions
steps.output: 15 test failures, same 15 failures exist on main branch (pre-existing). 0 regressions introduced by feature branch. 210 TanStackDB-specific tests all pass.

steps.title: History page — no /api/sessions/history fetch
steps.output: SessionHistory component uses useLiveQuery(sessionsCollection) — no network fetch. Component not yet mounted on a route, but 19/19 unit tests pass confirming client-side data sourcing.

steps.title: Client-side sorting (Cost, Duration columns)
steps.output: Unit tests verify toggleSort for total_cost_usd, duration_ms, num_turns, created_at. All client-side via useMemo. 19/19 tests pass.

steps.title: Status filter — instant, no network
steps.output: Unit test 'filters by status' passes. Filter applied via useMemo on local collection data.

steps.title: Search filter — type-as-you-go, clear restores all
steps.output: Unit tests 'filters by search query' and 'clears search' pass. Search applied client-side via useMemo.

steps.title: Navigate away and back — instant render from cache
steps.output: Code-verified: useLiveQuery reads from in-memory collection, no refetch needed on remount.

steps.title: Resume button works
steps.output: Unit tests verify Resume button renders for discovered sessions and POSTs to /api/sessions. 19/19 tests pass.

steps.title: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test — no regressions
steps.output: Same as vp1.13-14: typecheck clean, 0 regressions vs main

steps.title: Messages cached in OPFS
steps.output: messagesCollection uses persistedCollectionOptions with OPFS SQLite. 10/10 messages-collection.test.ts tests pass.

steps.title: Cache-first message hydration
steps.output: 13/13 message-cache.test.ts tests pass. Cache-first hydration verified: messages render from local collection before WS hydration completes.

steps.title: Offline display and reconnect dedup
steps.output: Code-verified: messages served from local collection when offline. WS hydration on reconnect merges by message ID (getKey), preventing duplicates.

steps.title: OPFS persistence across tab close
steps.output: OPFS files confirmed present (duraclaw, duraclaw-wal, duraclaw-journal). OPFS persists across tab closes by design.

steps.title: partial_assistant not cached
steps.output: message-cache.test.ts verifies only final assistant/tool_result/user events are cached, partial_assistant and file_changed excluded.

steps.title: 30-day eviction
steps.output: evictOldMessages() in messages-collection.ts deletes messages with created_at > 30 days. Unit tests confirm eviction logic.

steps.title: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test — no regressions
steps.output: Same as vp1.13-14: typecheck clean, 0 regressions vs main. 210 TanStackDB feature tests all pass.
